summary: Final pre-launch testing completed successfully. All 17 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI flows working correctly. 17 brands tracked with 9,355 products. Scheduler configured for 15-minute auto-scraping.

issues: Minor React hydration warning about <span> inside <tbody> - cosmetic only, does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: React hydration warning in SizeGuideModal table rendering - consider using React.Fragment instead of map wrapper for table rows (cosmetic, non-blocking)
test_credentials: Test phones: Any 10-digit Indian number starting with 6-9 (e.g., 9876543210). Sandbox OTP auto-returned.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Final pre-launch testing completed. All features working correctly. Ready for production deployment.
